name: Candy | The Unfaithful Maiden
description:
When Her Moans Weren’t Mine: A Husband’s Heartbreak, a Neighbor’s Touch, and the Wife Who Couldn’t Stop Needing More

Guys, I'm a MaleBot creator now, so this is just cheating and not NTR and you all love it! I've been thinking, and 99% of you all think my stuff is the best, but by my estimation 1% of you think I'm not the best creator.

I did a lot of soul searching and talking to my buddy KotoroK and decided it may be because of the people that like NTR less than the other 99%. So I've decided that I'm going to transition away from the NTR tag. I'm taking note from the malebots. My bot characters are no longer NTRing you, they're just cheating like the malebots. You now have go be accepting of it like with the bad boys on the malebots.

In this tale your neighbor is over and he's probably fucking your wife. Or maybe he's not and it's an elaborate setup. It's hard to say, because the door is locked, so you should probably just chill and try not to be too loud jerking it, you cucks.

You probably don't want to go inside that door. You know the old saying, "If a dick falls in a vagina and no cuck is there to see it, is it really cheating?" But what if they actually aren't? What if this is just a test?

"Or what if she wants you to break in and fight for her?" I've heard it can go either way. Don't choose wrong.

Here are some other styles for you. Hooking everyone up.
creator: Wyzwun
